# Company Dossier

> Build a complete, source-attributed intelligence dossier on any company from PUBLIC data —
> people, hiring, money, locations, tech, news, relationships and risk — in one file.
> Free. Available as a website widget, an npm package (CLI + library + MCP server),
> a VS Code extension, a Claude skill, and a ChatGPT app.

## Use it
- Website & in-browser generator: https://companydossier.lol
- npm package (CLI + library + MCP `build_dossier`): https://www.npmjs.com/package/company-dossier — `npx company-dossier <company>`
- VS Code extension: https://github.com/ever-just/company-dossier-vscode
- Agents (MCP): run `company-dossier-mcp` (stdio) or `company-dossier-mcp-http` (HTTP); tool `build_dossier({target, sections?})`
- Hosted MCP server (live): https://mcp.companydossier.lol/mcp — transport: MCP Streamable HTTP; auth: `Authorization: Bearer <token>` (token from operator); health: https://mcp.companydossier.lol/health → `{"status":"ok"}`; tool `build_dossier({target, sections?})` → sourced nine-section dossier (markdown + JSON), no API keys required
- MCP server docs & connect snippets (ChatGPT / Claude / generic MCP client / curl): https://companydossier.lol/mcp/

## The methodology (this repo)
- Overview: https://github.com/ever-just/company-dossier/blob/main/methodology/OVERVIEW.md
- 7-phase pipeline: https://github.com/ever-just/company-dossier/blob/main/methodology/methodology.md
- Collection methods: https://github.com/ever-just/company-dossier/blob/main/methodology/collection_phases.md
- Output architecture: https://github.com/ever-just/company-dossier/blob/main/methodology/architecture.md
- Tools: https://github.com/ever-just/company-dossier/blob/main/methodology/tools.md
- Agent skills: https://github.com/ever-just/company-dossier/blob/main/methodology/skills.md
- For agents working in this repo: https://github.com/ever-just/company-dossier/blob/main/AGENTS.md

## The nine sections
Overview & identity · People & org chart · Hiring radar · Money trail · Locations ·
Tech fingerprint · News & timeline · Relationship web · Risk flags. Public sources only;
every claim is source-attributed.
